title: MISURE IGIENICHE MINIME NEI CONFRONTI DELL’INFEZIONE DA VIRUS INFLUENZALI AVIARI
description: A guide to minimum hygiene and biosecurity measures aimed at reducing the risk of avian influenza infection in poultry farms. It outlines key practices including animal sourcing, farm compartmentalization, closed housing, litter management, staff training, visitor and vehicle control, pest management, and regular animal health monitoring.
